CreatePaidZone.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters.
CreatePaidZone.productVersion: The purchased product version, including: Standard Edition ("discount") and Enterprise Edition ("flagship").
CreatePaidZone.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Currently only Prepaid is supported.
CreatePaidZone.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; must be set for Prepaid.
